name: Invoice Follow-up
description: When a deal is won, creates a task to send an invoice and follow up on payment within 7 days.
descriptionAr: عند كسب صفقة، ينشئ مهمة لإرسال فاتورة ومتابعة الدفع خلال ٧ أيام.

config.title: Send invoice for {{title}}
config.description: Deal won. Prepare and send invoice for {{value}} {{currency}}.

config.title: Follow up on invoice: {{title}}
config.description: Check if invoice has been received and discuss payment timeline.
